ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no other enrichment
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no other enrichment

ingredients_text: Noodles (94%) [𝐖𝐡𝐞𝐚𝐭 𝐅𝐥𝐨𝐮𝐫, Palm Oil, Iodised Salt (Salt, Potassium Iodate), Sugar], Seasoning (7%) [Maltodextrin, Flavouring (Contains 𝐌𝐢𝐥𝐤 And 𝐒𝐨𝐲𝐚); Flavour Enhancers: Monosodium Glutamate, Disodium 5'-Ribonucleotides; Yeast Extract, Sugar, Iodised Salt (Salt, Potassium Iodate), Onion Powder, 𝐖𝐡𝐞𝐚𝐭 𝐅𝐥𝐨𝐮𝐫, Smoke Flavouring, Colour: Plain Caramel; Whole 𝐌𝐢𝐥𝐤 Powder, Dried Parsley, Paprika Extract, Acidity Regulator: Citric Acid; Black Pepper, 𝐂𝐞𝐥𝐞𝐫𝐲 Powder, Dried Thyme].
product_name: Make in Minutes Instant Noodles BBQ Beef Flavour
